reviews.author: swati verma
reviews.review_body: It was pleasure being a part of the event. The staff was too supportive and entertaining. My sone enjoyed the kite flying activity.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: shradha jain
reviews.review_body: It was a beautiful and proud feeling watching my child perform in front of such large gathering. All the performances were delightful. Chief guest Deepa Malik’s story was so inspiring. Heartfelt Thank you to school for this.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Dr.M Ahmad
reviews.review_body:
My heartfelt felicitations for the outstanding Annual Day celebrations that took place recently at MRIS.

The entire event was a resounding success, showcasing the hard work, dedication, and creativity of both the students and the faculty. From the vibrant performances to the well-coordinated presentations, every aspect of the program reflected the school's commitment to nurturing not only academic excellence but also the overall development of the students.

I would like to extend my gratitude to the teachers and staff for their tireless efforts in preparing the students for the performances. Their dedication was evident in the confidence and enthusiasm displayed by the participants. The thematic approach and attention to detail added a unique touch to the event, making it a memorable experience for both students and parents.

Thank you once again for orchestrating such a wonderful event. It not only celebrates the achievements of the students but also strengthens the sense of community within the school.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Maitrayee Bhoktiari
reviews.review_body: We have never been a part of such a great school annual show before. Each and every student was full of confidence and enthusiasm to play their part on stage and the flow of the show from the very beginning to ending was so seamless. The costume, light, background complementing each other to a great extent. Once again hats off to all the mentors and students to put up such a mesmerizing show.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Rakesh pandey
reviews.review_body: Wonderfully done by kids and special thanks to Priyanka Shukla mam for her efforts behind the scene

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Sonam Arora
reviews.review_body: The event was awesome. The hard work done by each and every one of the teaching staff was apparent. It was spectacular show

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Nilima Pal
reviews.review_body:
A big thank you to each one of you who made this annual day celebration  memorable for all of us.On behalf of the school let me thank all students of Mris ,Charmwood to be disciplined and  honored. Students  are excel  in the  classroom and  extracurricular  activities.
Special  thanks to the teacher's  and choreographers who trained our kids and polished  there talents.and made this event  grand success.

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: kanchan kalra Lifecoach
reviews.review_body:
SPANDAN , as it named , Event was Vibrating and pulsating.
It was mesmerized performance.
Way it was scripted , directed and performed was so good and professional.
My son in grade 7 Halley. It was hard to believe that Performers are student of middle wing I.e 6/7/8 th class.
Organising with so many  events ,era of music  with so many students,  Hats off to teachers, mentors ,organisers and whole team.
I congratulate MRIS Charmwood team  for successful annual day. Thank you so much .

Kanchan Kalra

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Sunita Goyal
reviews.review_body: Very 👍 experience of annual day . It was'nt only normal annual day it also good opportunity for students to participating in this. We also thankful to all teaching staff to prepared of this annual day and also thanks to our all kids 🥰 to make our fantastic 😍 day thankuuuuu.....

reviews.school_name: Manav Rachna International School - Charmwood Village
reviews.author: Reena Harikishan
reviews.review_body: "The annual day presentation was amazing! The precision, enthusiasm, and passion displayed by everyone involved showcased the incredible talent within our community." We really enjoyed the annual day celebration. 👏👏👏
